tools.name: get_application_link
tools.description: Returns the direct application link for a public open job. Use this tool when the user wants to apply for a specific job after identifying it via search_jobs or get_job_details.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Returns public details for a single open job by ID. Use this tool after search_jobs when the user wants more information about one specific job.

tools.name: list_contract_types
tools.description: Lists the available contract types, including IDs and names. Use this tool when the user wants to filter search_jobs by contract type.

tools.name: get_skill_clusters
tools.description: Returns the current skill cluster data for public jobs on the nü people website. Use this tool when the user wants an overview of which skills or technologies are currently in demand.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Searches currently open jobs on the nü people website. Use this tool when the user wants to find matching jobs by keyword, role, skill, location, or contract type. Returns a list of public job summaries.
